title: Day 3 — Conversational AI

sections.heading: Today's goal
sections.remember: Build a **chat app** with session history — Gradio **`ChatInterface`** + OpenAI streaming.

sections.heading: ChatInterface
points: Convert Gradio history to OpenAI dicts before each API call.

sections.heading: Building messages
sections.remember: `messages = [system] + history + [new user]` — same stateless rule as Week 1 Day 4: **resend full thread**.
sections.code:
def chat(message, history):
    history = [{"role": h["role"], "content": h["content"]} for h in history]
    messages = [{"role": "system", "content": system_message}] + history
    messages.append({"role": "user", "content": message})
    # stream=True, yield partial response

sections.heading: Domain system prompt
sections.remember: System message = store policy, tone, catalog facts — e.g. clothes shop sales assistant.
points: **One-shot examples** in system prompt show desired reply style.

sections.heading: Dynamic system prompt
sections.remember: If user mentions a keyword (e.g. "belt"), **append** compliance rules to system content for that turn.
points: Support, sales, HR bots — pattern works behind any API, not only Gradio.
Pitfall: replacing whole system prompt instead of appending rules.

cheatSheet: system + history + new user each call
Dynamic system = append rules on keywords
